name: estu-website
description: Eskişehir Technical University Website - Static HTML site with Vercel Web Analytics integration

scripts.start: echo 'This is a static HTML website. Open index.html in your browser or deploy to Vercel.'

author: Mehmet Fatih Durna

analytics.notes: Vercel Web Analytics has been integrated into all HTML pages using the /_vercel/insights/script.js approach. Analytics will automatically track page views when deployed to Vercel.
